identity.name: OLL Platform
principles: Glassy but Readable: Use glass effects for containers/overlays, but keep text on opaque or high-contrast backgrounds.
Red for Action, Blue for Trust: Strict color usage rules.
Mobile-First Funnels: One question per screen on mobile.
No-Scroll Decision: Landing page must present the 3 user paths immediately.

usage.gradients: bg-gradient-to-br from-[#1E3A5F] to-[#D63031] (Use sparingly, mostly for text or subtle overlays)

buttons.primary: h-12 px-8 rounded-full bg-[#D63031] text-white font-semibold hover:scale-105 transition-all shadow-lg shadow-red-500/25
buttons.secondary: h-12 px-8 rounded-full bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/20 text-[#1E3A5F] hover:bg-white/20 transition-all

cards.glass: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/40 shadow-xl shadow-blue-900/5
cards.solid: bg-white border border-slate-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow

inputs.default: h-12 bg-white/50 backdrop-blur-sm border-slate-200 focus:border-[#1E3A5F] focus:ring-[#1E3A5F]/20 rounded-lg

assets.icons: Use Lucide React icons. Stroke width 1.5px for elegance.

sections.name: Hero Selector
sections.description: Three equal-width vertical columns (on desktop) or stacked cards (mobile). Each represents a user type: Student, Educator, School.
sections.interaction: Hovering expands the column slightly. Clicking leads to the respective funnel.
sections.visuals: High-quality image background with heavy gradient overlay (Navy to Transparent). Large typography.

funnels.layout: Centered glass card on a subtle animated gradient background.

dashboard.style: Glassmorphic Sidebar + Clean White Content Area
dashboard.widgets: Stats cards, Recent Activity list, Calendar view.

universal_guidelines: Primary CTA buttons MUST be Red (#D63031).
Secondary buttons and Trust elements MUST be Navy Blue (#1E3A5F).
Do not use generic gradients. Use the specific Navy-Red brand gradient.
Ensure mobile responsiveness. Images max-h-[80vh] on mobile.
